nasb.text: There was a row of masonry round about in them, around the four of them, and boiling places were made under the rows round about.

esv.text: On the inside, around each of the four courts was a row of masonry, with hearths made at the bottom of the rows all around.

cnv.text: 在四個小院子裡面，每個四邊都有一排石牆；在這四排石牆下面，都有爐灶。

ccb.text: 每个庭院的墙周围都有一排石屋，屋里有炉灶。
